/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libmotor_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/motor_interface/msg/detail/joint_motor__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/niic/427/427/sb_new_tor/WK_ZY/build/motor_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmotor_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
